hooks.command: RS="$(command -v re-scale || true)"; [ -z "$RS" ] && RS="$(ls -t "$HOME"/.local/share/re-scale/*/bin/re-scale 2>/dev/null | head -1)"; [ -z "$RS" ] && RS="$HOME/Workspaces/kubuszok/re-scale/bin/re-scale"; [ -x "$RS" ] && "$RS" metals start --port 7846 >> "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/.rescale/.metals-hook.log" 2>&1 || true
